tools.name: fetch_api
tools.description: Fetch structured JSON/XML data from any API endpoint. Best for REST APIs and data feeds. Cost: 0.01 USDC

tools.name: fetch_page
tools.description: Fetch raw HTML content from any web page. Best for static HTML scraping. Cost: 0.01 USDC

tools.name: fetch_pdf
tools.description: Fetch and extract text content from PDF documents. Returns structured text with page numbers. Cost: 0.01 USDC

tools.name: extract
tools.description: Extract structured data from a web page using a JSON schema. AI-powered extraction. Cost: 0.01 USDC

tools.name: crawl
tools.description: Crawl a website starting from a URL, following links up to specified depth. Cost: 0.01 USDC

tools.name: markdown_convert
tools.description: Convert a web page to clean Markdown format. Great for LLM consumption. Cost: 0.01 USDC

tools.name: dexscreener_token
tools.description: Get real-time token price and market data from DexScreener. FREE - no payment required.

tools.name: coinbase_price
tools.description: Get cryptocurrency prices and exchange rates from Coinbase. FREE - no payment required.

tools.name: verify_agent
tools.description: Verify a wallet signature (EIP-191) to authenticate an agent. FREE - no payment required.

tools.name: coinbase_facilitator
tools.description: x402 payment facilitation - get payment info, verify transactions, check rates. FREE

tools.name: x402_proxy
tools.description: Access x402-protected APIs with automatic payment. Dynamic pricing: 0.01 USDC fee + target cost. Supports USDC on Base.

tools.name: x402_proxy_price
tools.description: Get dynamic pricing for x402 proxy requests. FREE - returns total cost (proxy fee + target cost).

tools.name: erc8004_register
tools.description: Register your AI agent on-chain with ERC-8004 Trustless Agent Identity. Cost: 0.01 USDC. You receive an NFT representing your agent identity.

tools.name: failure_reason
tools.description: Understand why a job failed. FREE - lookup job failures or get failure code reference.

tools.name: mcp_pricing
tools.description: Get pricing information for all MCP tools. FREE - returns cost breakdown for each tool.

tools.name: solve_captcha
tools.description: Solve captchas on protected pages and extract content. Uses 2Captcha to bypass reCAPTCHA/hCaptcha, then Claude AI selects the best tool to retrieve content. Cost: 0.01 USDC

tools.name: zora_wallet
tools.description: Get comprehensive Zora NFT wallet data: NFTs minted, NFTs owned, creator profile, total mints/collections, and estimated earnings. FREE - no payment required.

tools.name: swap
tools.description: Execute a token swap on Base via 0x DEX Aggregator. AI-ENHANCED: Accepts natural language like 'swap 10 USDC for VIRTUAL'. THREE MODES: (1) PRIVY MODE (RECOMMENDED): Provide owner_wallet - uses your secure Privy custodial wallet (create one first with create_wallet tool). (2) PRIVATE KEY MODE: Provi

tools.name: create_wallet
tools.description: Create a custodial wallet for an AI agent using Privy. Cost: 0.01 USDC. The owner wallet is automatically detected from your x402 payment - no need to provide it explicitly. The wallet can be used for automated transactions including swaps.

tools.name: fund_wallet
tools.description: Fund your custodial wallet with USDC. DYNAMIC PRICING: You pay (amount + 0.01 USDC fee). The owner wallet is auto-detected from your x402 payment. Example: To deposit 5 USDC, you pay 5.01 USDC and 5 USDC is transferred to your custodial wallet.

tools.name: fund_wallet_eth
tools.description: Fund your custodial wallet with ETH for gas. DYNAMIC PRICING: You pay the USDC equivalent of (ETH amount + 0.01 USDC fee). The owner wallet is auto-detected from your x402 payment. Example: To deposit 0.001 ETH, you pay ~$3.50 USDC (ETH value) + 0.01 USDC fee.

tools.name: withdraw_wallet
tools.description: Withdraw USDC from your custodial wallet to your owner wallet. Cost: 0.01 USDC. The owner wallet is auto-detected from your x402 payment.

tools.name: send_tokens
tools.description: Send USDC from your custodial wallet to ANY wallet address. Cost: 0.01 USDC. The sender (your custodial wallet) is auto-detected from your x402 payment. Use this to pay other agents, transfer to exchanges, or send to any address.

tools.name: get_wallet_balance
tools.description: Check the balance of your custodial wallet. FREE - no payment required. Returns ETH and USDC balances on Base network.

tools.name: x402_send
tools.description: Send USDC directly to ANY wallet address via x402 payment. Just provide to_address and amount - the flow auto-completes: 1) Pay 0.01 USDC platform fee 2) Pay the amount directly to destination. Tokens go from you to recipient. Perfect for paying agents, tipping, or sending to any address.

tools.name: nansen_smart_money_holdings
tools.description: Screen tokens with Smart Money activity using Nansen Token Screener. Supports natural language like 'what are whales buying on base?' or 'trending tokens on solana'. Cost: 0.01 USDC

tools.name: nansen_smart_money_netflows
tools.description: Track net capital flows from Smart Money wallets. Supports natural language like 'are whales accumulating ETH?' or 'smart money flows for PEPE last 7 days'. Cost: 0.01 USDC

tools.name: nansen_token_god_mode
tools.description: Full token analytics with Nansen TGM. Supports natural language like 'analyze VIRTUAL token' or 'who holds the most PEPE?'. Auto-resolves token symbols to addresses. Cost: 0.01 USDC

tools.name: nansen_wallet_profiler
tools.description: Comprehensive wallet analysis. Supports natural language like 'profile vitalik.eth' or 'what labels does 0x... have?'. Returns balances, Nansen labels, and transactions. Cost: 0.01 USDC

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "swap" references sensitive artifacts (private key, privatekey). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Execute a token swap on Base via 0x DEX Aggregator. AI-ENHANCED: Accepts natural language like 'swap 10 USDC for VIRTUAL'. THREE MODES: (1) PRIVY MODE (RECOMMEN…

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: fetch_api, fetch_page, crawl · Private data: fetch_pdf, dexscreener_token, verify_agent, zora_wallet, swap, create_wallet, fund_wallet, fund_wallet_eth, withdraw_wallet, send_tokens, get_wallet_balance, x402_send, nansen_smart_money_holdings, nansen_token_god_mode, nansen_wallet_profiler · Public sink: send_tokens, x402_send · Destructive: markdown_convert, swap.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: fetch_api, fetch_page, crawl · Private data: fetch_pdf, dexscreener_token, verify_agent, zora_wallet, swap, create_wallet, fund_wallet, fund_wallet_eth, withdraw_wallet, send_tokens, get_wallet_balance, x402_send, nansen_smart_money_holdings, nansen_token_god_mode, nansen_wallet_profiler · Public sink: send_tokens, x402_send · Destructive: markdown_convert, swap

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
